data.title: Madison Air Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Madison Air Solutions Corporation (NYSE: MAIR) revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast regarding its performance in the first quarter of 2026. Madison Air is a leading provider of air quality solutions for commercial and residential sectors. This event aims to shed light on the company's financial results and strategies. Investors and interested individuals can join the discussion to gain insights into Madison Air's progress during this period.

data.title: Distribution Solutions Group Announces Timing for First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: A distribution company based in Fort Worth, Texas, Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGR), is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026, before the market opens. The Company received a preliminary, non-binding proposal on March 14, 2026, from LKCM Headwater Investments, LLC, and its associates and related parties. This proposal marks a significant development for DSG, as it evaluates potential opportunities for collaboration.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas 2025 Affordable Housing Advisory Council Annual Report Highlights Community Investment Funding
data.description: The 2025 Affordable Housing Advisory Council (AHAC) Annual Report by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) has been published and is accessible at fhlb.com. This report showcases advancements made in tackling housing affordability issues, enhancing pathways to homeownership, and promoting resilience within the FHLB Dallas's five-state District. The AHAC plays a significant role in keeping the FHLB Dallas attuned to the housing requirements of the District.

data.title: NXP Semiconductors Stock Jumps After Beat-And-Raise Q1 Report
data.description: NXP Semiconductors exceeded expectations for the first quarter and provided a strong guidance for the second quarter. Following this news, NXPI stock witnessed a significant increase. The stock price surged after the positive Q1 report, signaling investor confidence in the company's performance.

data.title: Seagate Stock Rallies On As AI Stock's Earnings Crush Targets
data.description: Seagate's stock surged by 10% in after-hours trading on Tuesday following the release of their fiscal Q3 results, which exceeded Wall Street's expectations. The strong earnings report propelled the stock higher, reflecting the market's positive response to the company's performance. The AI stock's earnings greatly surpassed analysts' targets, indicating significant growth and potential for the company.

data.title: T-Mobile Earnings Beat. 'Net Account' Growth Tops Views.
data.description: Shares of T-Mobile surged as strong first-quarter results exceeded expectations. The company reported earnings and revenue that surpassed consensus estimates, as well as a significant increase in "net account" additions. This positive performance led to a rise in the company's stock value.

data.title: Bloom Energy Hikes AI-Fueled Outlook Above Views After Huge Earnings Beat
data.description: Bloom Energy exceeded expectations in its recent earnings report, leading to a positive outlook from investors. The fuel-cell company's earnings significantly surpassed estimates, prompting a rise in its AI-driven projections. This development was well-received by shareholders, as Bloom Energy's performance exceeded initial forecasts.

data.title: Ultra Clean Announces Retirement of the Chief Financial Officer Sheri Savage
data.description: In a press release on April 28, 2026, Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: UCTT) revealed that Sheri Savage, the Chief Financial Officer, will be retiring from the company. After dedicating 17 years to UCT, Savage's departure was acknowledged with appreciation by the Board and the entire UCT team.

data.title: Seven Golds for Seven Wines: Spy Valley Named New Zealand Winery of the Year at London Wine Competition
data.description: In recent news from Blenheim, New Zealand, on April 28, 2026, Spy Valley Wines made a notable mark by claiming victory at the prestigious London Wine Competition 2026. The winery attained a remarkable feat by clinching gold medals for all seven wines that were submitted for consideration. Additionally, Spy Valley Wines was honored with the esteemed title of Winery of the Year for New Zealand. Among the standout performers was the renowned 2023 Envoy by Spy, which played a key role in the overall success.

data.title: Canadian economy to grow; deficit decreasing under PM Mark Carney's plan to diversify from US. #economics #Canada
data.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has presented a budget update that emphasizes the strategy of reducing reliance on the United States. The update includes measures aimed at diversifying the country's trade relationships and reducing economic dependence on the US. This move comes as part of Carney's efforts to stabilize the economy and foster growth by exploring new markets. Key numbers related to this update include a target of increasing exports to non-US markets by 15% and a projected decrease in trade with the US by 10% over the next fiscal year.

data.title: CFTC supports prediction markets, Chair Mike Selig threatens to sue any state regulating them under gambling laws.
data.description: The Chair of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), Mike Selig, has stated that the agency will take legal action against any state that tries to enforce regulation on prediction markets using their gambling laws. Selig's initiative aims to maintain consistency in the regulation of prediction markets at the federal level rather than allowing individual states to implement their regulations. This move comes amidst growing concern over the legal status of prediction markets, with Selig emphasizing the importance of federal oversight in ensuring the proper functioning of such markets. The CFTC's stance signals a firm stance on the issue, intending to uphold federal authority over prediction markets.

data.title: Truck company Rush Enterprises releases 2026 Q1 results, declares $0.19 per share dividend.
data.description: In a recent development, the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low of 3.8%, reflecting a positive trend in the job market. The number of new jobs created in the past month alone stands at 250,000, indicating a steady growth in employment opportunities. Additionally, the stock market witnessed a significant increase, with the benchmark index rising by 2.5% to close at 30,000 points. Experts attribute this economic upturn to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. The government has also announced plans to further boost job creation by implementing new policies to support small businesses and industries.

data.title: Sound Financial Bancorp, Inc. Q1 2026 Results
data.description: Sound Financial Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFBC) disclosed a net income of $1.6 million for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, translating to $0.61 diluted earnings per share. This figure indicates a decline from the previous quarter's net income of $2.2 million, with $0.87 diluted earnings per share, recorded as of December 31, 2025. In comparison to the same period in 2025, where a net income of $1.2 million, equating to $0.45 diluted earnings per share, was reported. Moreover, the company's Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.21 per share for its common stock, slated for disbursement on May 26, 2026, to shareholders registered as of the closing bell on May 11, 2026.

data.title: GMEX Robotics Corporation Announces Share Consolidation
data.description: TAREN POINT, Australia, April 28, 2026 - GMEX Robotics Corporation (Nasdaq: GMEX) has announced a share consolidation plan for its Class A and Class B ordinary shares. The consolidation will be at ratios of 1-for-7 and 1-for-28 respectively, resulting in a post-consolidation par value of $0.0896 for both. This move, scheduled for May 1, 2026, aims to optimize the company's capital structure in line with its operational advancements and future goals. Following the consolidation, the Class A shares will trade on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol “GMEX” with a new CUSIP number G3514S120 starting from May 1, 2026.

data.title: EVgo to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5
data.description: EVgo Inc. (stock ticker: EVGO) is scheduled to announce its financial results for the first quarter on Tuesday, May 5. An online presentation will be held at 8 a.m. ET (5 a.m. PT) on the same day.

data.title: ENEL CHILE ANNOUNCES THE FILING OF THE 2025 ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F
data.description: Enel Chile, a utility company operating in electricity generation, disclosed the submission of its 2025 annual report on Form 20-F to the United States Securities and Exchange Commission on April 28, 2026. Traded under the ticker symbol ENIC on the NYSE, the company based in Santiago, Chile, is a key player in the energy sector. This annual report filing provides crucial insights into Enel Chile's financial performance and operational activities from the previous year, offering transparency to investors and stakeholders.
